## Overview

- [x] Initial project setup and configuration
- [x] Core module implementation
- [x] Unit tests for core functionality

- [ ] Integration testing
- [ ] Documentation updates

## Next Steps

- Review and merge pending pull requests.
- Prepare for the next sprint planning meeting.","path":"docs/status.md"},"name":"write"},"id":"call_eUTbuYYO8kr6VLKdn1ctia0F","type":"function","index":0}],"finish_reason":"tool_calls","refusal":null}
